blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 62 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
